rules.cssText: .Gallery_pageDescriptionContainer__ejv7L { flex-direction: column; gap: var(--spacing-4); align-items: flex-start; }
.Gallery_imageWrapper__HR75R { height: var(--height); margin-top: 56px; transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1); }

.Reel_container__RTD5U { width: calc(100% + var(--spacing-6)); padding: var(--spacing-5) var(--spacing-3); margin: calc(-1 * var(--spacing-5)) calc(-1 * var(--spacing-3)); mask-image: linear-gradient(to right,transparent,black var(--spacing-8),black calc(100% - var(--spacing-13)),transparent); }
.RaycastWindow_raycastWindowOuter__A71be { grid-template-rows: 40px auto; height: 320px; border: 0.75px solid rgba(142, 140, 144, 0.2); }
.RaycastWindow_raycastWindowOuter__A71be { grid-template-rows: 56px auto; height: 475px; border: 1px solid rgba(142, 140, 144, 0.2); border-radius: var(--rounding-md); }
.RaycastWindow_raycastWindowOuter__A71be::before { top: 15px; left: 56%; width: 360px; height: 20px; filter: blur(50px); transform: translateX(-50%) translateZ(0px); }
.RaycastWindow_raycastWindowOuter__A71be::before { top: 20px; width: 481px; height: 26px; filter: blur(70px); transform: translateX(-50%) translateZ(0px); }
.RaycastWindow_cursor__L1I8m.RaycastWindow_blink__2uJwJ { animation: 1.1s step-end 0s infinite normal none running RaycastWindow_blink__2uJwJ; }
.RaycastWindow_sectionTitle__LU_Hf { padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-1) var(--spacing-1); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.1px; }
.RaycastWindow_listItem__FfuQQ { gap: 10px; height: 40px; padding: 0 var(--spacing-1); font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.1px; }
.AIShowCase_pageDescriptionContainer__Ihe_9 { flex-direction: column; gap: var(--spacing-4); align-items: flex-start; }
.FeatureWall_left__5x6NB { flex: 1 1 0%; flex-direction: column; gap: var(--spacing-9); min-width: 380px; padding: 0 var(--spacing-3); }

.Hero_bg__Uo_js.Hero_top__1GsXj { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(0.75); transform-origin: center top; }

.shared_heroBackgroundContainer__3rwV4 { left: 0px; mask-image: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0px, rgb(255, 255, 255) 10%, rgb(255, 255, 255) 90%, transparent); }
.Navbar_navbar__XlgWY { display: flex; padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-4); overflow: visible; }
.Navbar_logoContainer__enocR { position: absolute; top: 50%; left: var(--spacing-4); justify-content: center; width: auto; transform: translateY(-50%); }
.Navbar_navigation__sNAXS { flex-direction: row; gap: var(--spacing-2); align-items: center; padding: 0px; }
.Navbar_secondary__UAPPh { position: absolute; top: 50%; right: var(--spacing-4); display: grid; align-items: center; height: 100%; padding: 0px; border-top: none; transform: translateY(-50%); }
.Navbar_signedInMenuContainer__b8kqU:hover .Navbar_signedInMenu__r14qn { display: flex; animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal forwards running Navbar_slideIn__6YfDM; }
.Navbar_signedInAction__LMhGM { display: flex; gap: var(--spacing-1); align-items: center; padding: var(--spacing-1) 0; cursor: pointer; }

.Navbar_signedInMenu__r14qn { position: absolute; top: 100%; right: -10px; display: none; gap: 0px; min-width: 140px; padding: 0px; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(137deg, rgba(17, 18, 20, 0.75) 4.87%, rgba(12, 13, 15, 0.9) 75.88%); backdrop-filter: blur(5px); border: 1px solid var(--Card-Border,rgba(255,255,255,.06)); border-radius: var(--rounding-sm); box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) 0px 1px 1px 0px inset; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s; transform: translateZ(0px); }
.Navbar_signedOutWide__P7f_w { display: flex; gap: var(--spacing-3); align-items: center; }
.Footer_newsletter__wZsad { flex-direction: row; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
.CommunitySection_socials___HNIF { grid-template-areas: "title title" "slack twitter"; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: var(--spacing-7) var(--spacing-5); }
.ExtensionHighlight_top__Nem0f { flex-direction: column; gap: var(--spacing-5); align-items: flex-start; }

.ExtensionHighlight_padding__U1KfF::after { position: relative; display: flex; width: 0px; content: ""; scroll-snap-align: end; }

.AIShowcase_backdrop__8z__V { top: -61px; left: -2%; filter: blur(75px); transform: translateZ(0px); }
.ExtensionCard_headerContainer__48wVu { gap: var(--spacing-3); padding-top: ; padding-right: ; padding-left: ; padding-bottom: 0px; }

.Extensions_padding__LQPqD::after { position: relative; display: flex; width: 0px; content: ""; scroll-snap-align: end; }
.FeatureWall_content__MzdXv { gap: var(--spacing-2); padding: var(--spacing-1-5) var(--spacing-3) var(--spacing-3); }
.FeatureWall_content__MzdXv { gap: var(--spacing-3); padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-4) var(--spacing-4); }

.AppLauncherPoster_sectionTitle__tKjWQ { padding: var(--spacing-1-5) var(--spacing-1) var(--spacing-1); font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.08px; }

.AppLauncherPoster_listItem__vlPnI { gap: var(--spacing-1-5); height: 48px; padding: 0 var(--spacing-1); font-size: 16px; letter-spacing: 0.06px; border-radius: var(--rounding-normal); }
.AppLauncherPoster_listItem__vlPnI { height: 60px; padding: 0 var(--spacing-1-5); font-size: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.1px; border-radius: var(--rounding-md); }

.AppLauncherPoster_appIcon__w2lRD { width: 143px; height: 143px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.57) 0px 0.6px 0px 0px inset, rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 27.21px 44.897px 0px, rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 27.21px 102.078px 0px, rgba(108, 108, 108, 0.25) 0px 4.85px 29.09px 0px inset, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18) 0px -1.36px 0px 0px inset, rgba(66, 66, 66, 0.38) 0px -6.8px 12.25px 0px inset, rgba(50, 87, 255, 0.11) 0px 1.36px 5.44px 2.72px inset, rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px 8.16px 8.16px 6.8px inset, rgb(0, 0, 0) 0px -6.8px 17.69px 0px inset; transform: translateZ(0px); }
